news.t: First Trust Launches Two New Allocation-Based Portfolios of Target Outcome Buffer ETFs

overview.description: The FT Vest Buffered Allocation Defensive ETF (BUFT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively-managed fund-of-funds that allocates exposure to defined outcome buffer ETFs referencing the SPY. BUFT was launched on Oct 26, 2021 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Launches Two New Allocation-Based Portfolios of Target Outcome Buffer ETFs
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched the FT Cboe Vest Buff...
